title: Ubiquiti UVC-AI-Theta-Audio - AI Theta audio
description: Plug-and-play high-performance audio module - microphone and speaker in one designed exclusively for the UniFi Protect AI Theta camera with a maximum consumption of 4.5W. The speaker is supplied with a 1m USB-C connecting cable and a plastic holder for ceiling or plasterboard wall
